name: Alaska Vol-au-Vents
recipeIngredient: 418 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon and flake the fish into a bowl. Set aside.
2. Scoop out the soft pastry from inside the vol-au-vent cases.
3. In another bowl, sprinkle salt on diced cucumber and allow to stand for 15 minutes. Rinse thoroughly and pat dry.
4. Mix the cucumber with the remaining ingredients (salmon, mayonnaise, sour cream, and mint) until combined.
5. Pile equal amounts of the salmon filling into each vol-au-vent case and replace the lids.
6. Serve garnished with salad.
Makes 24 servings. Approximately 140 calories per serving.
